title: Fix fresh-install write-guard crash: vendor tokenize-command.mjs (HOOK_FILENAMES) + import-closure regression test
action: Canary P5 caught a live regression (validation-canary.md §1): hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs:38 imports ./tokenize-command.mjs (added by state-query-surface sqs-a) but HOOK_FILENAMES in skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs:177-194 does not vendor it, so EVERY fresh repo-hooks install ships a write guard that crashes ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND (fail-open) instead of blocking pre-Gate-3 writes. Fix: add "tokenize-command.mjs" to HOOK_FILENAMES with a comment naming the importer (mirroring adapter.mjs's comment style). Then write scripts/test_hook_vendor_closure.mjs so this CLASS of drift cannot recur: statically parse each file named in HOOK_FILENAMES (read the list from onboard_bee.mjs or re-derive) for relative static imports (import ... from "./x.mjs") and assert every imported basename is itself in HOOK_FILENAMES (lib/ imports resolve against the vendored lib set if the hook imports ../lib/); fail naming the missing file and its importer. PLAN-CHECK W2: NO manual registry entry — run_verify.mjs auto-discovers scripts/test_*.mjs via DISCOVERY_ROOTS glob; just confirm node scripts/run_verify.mjs --only test_hook_vendor_closure finds it. Regen obligation inside THIS cell: node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write. After regen confirm .bee/bin/hooks/tokenize-command.mjs exists in a FRESH onboard (the test may build a temp fixture via onboard_bee.mjs --apply --repo-hooks into .bee/tmp/ and assert the file lands + node --check passes on the vendored bee-write-guard.mjs).

truths: a fresh repo-hooks onboard vendors every module the vendored hooks import
the regression test fails if any hook gains a relative import not in the vendored set
prohibitions: no weakening of the write guard itself
no hand-edits to vendored .bee/bin — canonical + regen only

trace.outcome: Vendored HOOK_FILENAMES was missing tokenize-command.mjs, so every fresh --repo-hooks install crashed the write guard with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND (canary P5, fail-open). Added it with a provenance comment, wrote scripts/test_hook_vendor_closure.mjs (static import-closure parse of HOOK_FILENAMES + a real fresh-install/subprocess proof that the vendored guard no longer crashes at import), and synced canonical -> vendored trees via render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs + self-onboard --apply + release_manifest.mjs --write.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": ["scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs", "skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs", "hooks/test_write_guard.mjs"],
  "tests_added_or_changed": ["scripts/test_hook_vendor_closure.mjs (new, 8 assertions: 2 self-test, 2 static-closure, 4 fresh-install/subprocess)"],
  "red_failure_evidence": "git stash of skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs's HOOK_FILENAMES fix, then `node scripts/test_hook_vendor_closure.mjs`: 4 of 8 checks FAIL, including 'vendored bee-write-guard.mjs never crashes ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND at import' which reproduces the exact canary P5 stack trace (Error [ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND]: Cannot find module '.../.bee/bin/hooks/tokenize-command.mjs' imported from '.../.bee/bin/hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs'). Stash popped to restore the fix.",
  "verification_run": "node scripts/test_hook_vendor_closure.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check -> all 8 checks PASS, release_manifest --check: 510 file(s) match stored manifest",
  "deliberate_exceptions": ["Cell text suggested 'node --check passes on the vendored bee-write-guard.mjs' as sufficient fresh-install proof; verified empirically that node --check is syntax-only and does NOT catch a missing relative-import module (node --check on a file importing a nonexistent sibling exits 0), so it cannot prove this closure. Used a real subprocess run of the vendored guard instead, asserting absence of ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND in stderr -- this is what actually reproduces and proves the canary P5 failure mode is fixed."]
}

PASS self-test: closure parser is silent once the import is listed
PASS HOOK_FILENAMES lists tokenize-command.mjs (i54-closeout-9 fix)
PASS HOOK_FILENAMES is import-closed: every relative import of a listed hook is itself listed
PASS fresh --repo-hooks apply succeeds
PASS fresh install vendors .bee/bin/hooks/tokenize-command.mjs
PASS fresh install vendors .bee/bin/hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs
PASS vendored bee-write-guard.mjs never crashes ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND at import (canary P5 regression)
PASS test_hook_vendor_closure: all checks passed
release_manifest --check: 510 file(s) match stored manifest
